title: Kya Woh Sach Tha
author: Fever FM – HT Smartcast
description: Real life events se inspired supernatural stories ka collection — jo sunoge, roye nahi to rone par majboor zaroor ho jaoge.

episodes.title: #1 Highway Ka Bhoot
episodes.description: Mumbai ke Anuj ke saath uss raat kya hua — highway par ek aisi mulaqaat jisne unki zindagi badal di.

episodes.title: #2 Bachchi Ki Pret Aatma
episodes.description: Lucknow ke Saurabh Sinha ke saath ghati yeh ghatna.

title: Insta Love
author: RosePod
description: Rishi aur Nikita ki love story — breakup ke baad dono ek hi influencer company mein aa jaate hain.

episodes.title: Ep 1 – Love at First Sight
episodes.description: Rishi aur Nikita ki pehli mulaqaat.

title: Khooni : Crimes of India
author: Khooni : Crimes of India
description: Presenting Khooni -The Crimes of India Podcast, where every week two Indian girls, try to navigate the murky waters of true crime in their country.

episodes.title: The Murder of Graham Staines
episodes.description: TW : Crimes Against Children, Graphic Violence, Communal Violence. Listen to our episode to find out how it reared its ugly head in Odisha in 1999.

episodes.title: Review : Black Warrant - Confessions of a Tihar Jailer
episodes.description: In today's Shorty, Sneha talks about Black Warrant : Confessions of a Tihar Jailer, and her fascination with Prisons, True Crime and Death Penalty.

episodes.title: Cyanide Mallika
episodes.description: A Tale of Gold and Cyanide. All comments about any person/group of persons made in this podcast are personal and are not intended to hurt anyone’s feelings.

episodes.title: TRAILER!
episodes.description: Presenting the trailer for Khooni the Podcast. Music credits: Private Eye by Kevin MacLeod.

episodes.title: India's Youngest Serial Killer (So Far)
episodes.description: Amardeep Sada, is just a normal boy living in rural Bihar. So why are his neighbours afraid of him? What secrets does his family harbour?

episodes.title: The Tandoor Murder
episodes.description: Trigger Warning : Domestic Violence, Spousal Violence. Naina Sahni could have been a fashion designer in Australia. Or a pilot flying all over the world.
